1988.blurb: The Feelies spent 1988 navigating the tension between their growing fame and a deep-seated aversion to life on the road. While supporting their major-label debut, Only Life, they prioritized the intimate energy of small clubs over the professional demands of larger theaters. This year was defined by high-profile opening slots that often reinforced their preference for the creative comfort of their home base in Haledon.

quotes.text: Touring is OK, but we just hate being away from home for too long.
We liked the jam-packed clubs. We saw a lot of value in staying where we were at.
It’s not fun, it’s comical. You are told not to talk to him, not to look him in the eye. [Regarding opening for Bob Dylan]

2008.blurb: New Jersey art-rock band reunited in 2008 after a 17-year hiatus, known for frenetic live performances and meticulous studio work.

quotes.text: We were getting kind of burnt with playing and touring at that point.

2014.blurb: Nashville rock band at peak momentum in 2014, known for their four-guitar lineup and ferociously energetic live shows.

2012.blurb: New York-based guitarist touring behind her album 'The Chronicles of Marnia', known for two-handed tapping and relentless live energy.
